'''Balanor''' was the [[Forest/Legends|rainforest]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Noonian sector/Legends|Noonian sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Balnanor was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Balanoro Force mite|Force mite]].

{{Planet-stub}}
